blurb: Law-firm AI/regulatory practice. Launch coverage uses first-party EU AI Act publication.

publications.title: EU AI Act to Enter into Force
publications.summary: Slaughter and May summarises the EU AI Act entering into force, highlighting responsible innovation, extraterritorial reach, fines and prohibited/high-risk AI obligations.

publications.title: Regulating AI
publications.summary: Slaughter and May’s AI regulation hub covers governance, data, IP, contracts and regulatory issues for organisations developing or deploying AI.

publications.title: Digital Markets Act: Cloud services and AI in focus
publications.summary: Slaughter and May analyses the European Commission review making cloud services and AI a focus for digital regulation under the DMA.
